title: Honored to be partnering with Nature Mental Health to convene the newly announced Precision Mental Health Commission, and excited to work with Lara Foland-Ross, Ph.D.
post: Honored to be partnering with Nature Mental Health to convene the newly announced Precision Mental Health Commission, and excited to work with Lara Foland-Ross, Ph.D. and Max Wintermark, alongside an international, multidisciplinary group of leaders as this effort unfolds.
